exercises.title: PQC Metrics Collector
exercises.description: Build a metrics collection system for PQC monitoring.
hints: Implement sliding window for latency histograms

exercises.title: Health Check Framework
exercises.description: Create a cryptographic health check framework.
exercises.expectedOutput: Health check framework with status reporting
hints: Use enum for health status (OK, WARNING, CRITICAL)
Include check details and remediation suggestions
Cache results to avoid redundant checks

exercises.title: Alert Manager
exercises.description: Build an alert management system for PQC operations.
tasks: Add cooldown to prevent alert storms
exercises.expectedOutput: Alert manager with routing and cooldown

exercises.title: Migration Dashboard Generator
exercises.description: Create a migration progress dashboard generator.
tasks: Track items by category and tier
exercises.expectedOutput: Migration dashboard with visual progress indicators
hints: Group items by category for organized display
